# site/data.json schema (regenerated by every engine cycle)

PRIVACY: never include account numbers, API keys, or the raw $100K paper balance. Paper values are SLEEVE values ($5,000 + cumulative sleeve P&L).

```json
{
  "generated_at": "ISO-8601",
  "market_note": "short string, e.g. 'Market closed — next open Mon 7/6 9:30 ET'",
  "paper": {
    "equity": 5000.0, "equity_note": "sleeve, autonomous",
    "total_pnl": 0.0, "day_pnl": 0.0,
    "positions": [{"symbol":"TSLA","qty":3,"entry":0.0,"current":0.0,"pl":0.0,"plpc":0.0,"thesis":"one-two lines"}],
    "equity_curve": [{"date":"Jul 6","value":5000.0}]
  },
  "live": { "same shape": "equity = real account equity" },
  "pending_tickets": [{"side":"buy","symbol":"NVDA","size":"$250","bracket":"-10% / +25%","thesis":"..."}],
  "recent_trades": [{"ts":"ISO","account":"paper|live","side":"buy","symbol":"X","qty":3,"price":0.0,"tag":"slug","thesis":"...","result":"+8.2% target hit | null"}],
  "latest_recap": "plain-text: latest EOD recap or cycle summary, a few short paragraphs"
}
```

Keep equity_curve append-only per trading day (last ~90 points). The orchestrator pushes site/ within ~30 min of any change; Netlify redeploys automatically.
